name: Noparde Gobo Projector FAQ
description: Structured FAQ data for Noparde gobo projectors, logo projectors, dynamic laser projectors, water-ripple lights, and custom projection solutions.

items.question: How many watts can the starry sky projector be made in?
items.answer: The starry sky projector can currently be made as rotating image projection or water-ripple projection. The available power range can be 200W or 300W.
items.originalQuestion: 星耀目前可以做多少瓦
items.originalAnswer: 目前星耀可以做旋转换图灯/换色水纹灯，功率可以做200/300W

items.question: How many watts can the LiYing PRO projector be made in?
items.answer: The LiYing PRO projector can currently be made with 100W, 120W, 135W, 150W, 180W, and 200W lamp options.
items.originalQuestion: 励影PRO可以做多少瓦

items.question: What is the weight of the 50W yellow worm spotlight?
items.answer: The 50W yellow worm spotlight weighs about 3.65 kg.
items.originalQuestion: 50W黄火虫探灯重量3.65KG
items.originalAnswer: 50W黄火虫探灯重量3.65KG

items.question: Can customers customize video interactive effects for the projector?
items.answer: No. Custom video interactive projection effects are not supported in the current product scope.
items.originalQuestion: 如果客户要定制自己的视频切带互动效果,咱们可以做到么?
items.originalAnswer: 不可以的，实现不了

items.question: What is the difference between the newest high-power 1.0 lens and the standard 30 mm slide lens?
items.answer: The newer high-power 1.0 lens uses a 23 mm inner-image diameter, while a standard slide lens is commonly described around 30 mm. Confirm the effective image size before production so the projected image is not cropped.
items.originalQuestion: 大功率最新的那个1.0镜头,正常是灯片打30mm，要是灯片内径打23mm还是用1.0镜头那它的比例会有变化么?
items.originalAnswer: 会的，正常1.0镜头，灯片内径是打30毫米 100厘米(距离)÷30毫米(灯片尺寸)=每毫米比例是3.3 3.3*25=0.82

items.question: Can an 800W projector be customized for 380V power supply?
items.answer: No. At present, there is no matching 380V power supply for this 800W customization request.
items.originalQuestion: 800W可以定制380v电压吗
items.originalAnswer: 不可以，目前没有相对应电源

items.question: Can the speaker play music?
items.answer: The 30W large red speaker can play music. The music file should be smaller than 4 MB and should use MP3 format.
items.originalQuestion: 喇叭可以设置音乐吗
items.originalAnswer: 目前我们30W的大红喇叭可以设置音乐，前提音乐本身内存要小于4M以内，格式要MP3格式

items.question: What is the difference between LiYing 100W and GaoJu 100W?
items.answer: The two 100W models have different appearances. LiYing has better waterproof performance.
items.originalQuestion: 励影的100瓦和高巨的100瓦有什么区别
items.originalAnswer: 两者外观不同，励影灯具防水性能更好

items.question: Can a lamp be customized for 660V power supply?
items.answer: No. At present, there is no matching power supply for 660V customization.
items.originalQuestion: 灯具可以定制660V电压吗
items.originalAnswer: 不可以，目前没有相对应电源

items.question: Can a 120W water-ripple projector be made with the GaoJu appearance?
items.answer: Yes. A 120W water-ripple projector can be made with the GaoJu appearance.
items.originalQuestion: 水纹灯高巨外观可以做120W吗
items.originalAnswer: 可以的，120W水纹灯可以做高巨外观

items.question: Can the text on the dynamic laser projector be changed?
items.answer: Yes. The text on the dynamic laser projector can be edited through mobile phone software or computer software. For example, Lingdong Smart AP can be used to edit text.
items.originalQuestion: 动画激光灯投影数字可以更换字体吗
items.originalAnswer: 可以，动画激光灯可以通过手机或电脑软件（例如灵动智绘APP）来编辑字体

items.question: What are the shipping cost references for water-ripple, LiYing, SanGao, default shipment, and transfer shipment?
items.answer: The shipping cost changes by destination, product weight, shipping method, and shipment plan. Use the latest logistics quotation before confirming the order.
items.originalQuestion: 水纹灯、励影、三高、默认出货转运是多少
items.originalAnswer: 出货工具转运参数可参考运费链接：https://shenzhen-alading.yuque.com/rzssio/cf_records/kgfqoommfaq19n0g

items.question: What are the KPPS speed and beam angle of the dynamic laser projector?
items.answer: The dynamic laser projector has a standard KPPS speed of 30 kpps and a beam angle of 40 degrees. For exact performance details, check the selected model's vibration and scanning parameters.
items.originalQuestion: 动画激光灯的KPPS速度和光束角是多少
items.originalAnswer: KPPS速度标准默认是30kpps，光束角时40度，具体看动画激光灯振镜参数

items.question: Can the starry sky light be made as a solar-powered model?
items.answer: Yes. The starry sky light can be made with a solar-powered configuration.
items.originalQuestion: 星空灯可以做太阳能款吗
items.originalAnswer: 可以的

items.question: Can vehicle-mounted lamps be customized with PDD appearance?
items.answer: Yes. Vehicle-mounted lamps can be customized with PDD appearance.
items.originalQuestion: 车载款灯具可以定制PDD外观吗
items.originalAnswer: 可以的，车载款灯具可以定制PDD外观

items.question: Which lamps have CE certification?
items.answer: Current CE-certified lamps include the high-power 300W lamp and the LiYing 100W lamp.
items.originalQuestion: 我们有哪些灯具有CE认证证书
items.originalAnswer: 目前有CE认证证书的灯具为大功率300W和励影100W灯具

items.question: Which model is the water-ripple rotating light?
items.answer: The water-ripple rotating light is similar to a water-ripple lamp with an additional slide mechanism. It does not require a water-ripple film.
items.originalQuestion: 光影流转灯是那个型号的灯具?
items.originalAnswer: 类似水纹，就是给水纹增加了一个灯片，不需要装水纹小片

items.question: Can the 20W animation laser projector support 3-country integration?
items.answer: Yes. Technical guidance is required from the overseas trade team.
items.originalQuestion: 外厂20W动画激光灯可以实现3台国家融合吗
items.originalAnswer: 可以的，需要外厂技术人员介入指导

items.question: What is the safety class of the animation laser projector?
items.answer: The animation laser projector safety class is Class 4.
items.originalQuestion: 动画激光灯的安全等级是多少
items.originalAnswer: 动画激光灯的安全等级：Class.4级

items.question: What is the weight of the 300W dual-head lamp?
items.answer: The 300W dual-head lamp weighs about 6.5 kg.
items.originalQuestion: 300W双头灯重量是多少呢
items.originalAnswer: 300W双头灯重量为：6.5KG

items.question: Can the animation laser projector use solar power?
items.answer: No. The animation laser projector cannot use solar power, and it also cannot use battery power.
items.originalQuestion: 动画激光灯可以使用太阳能吗?
items.originalAnswer: 不可以 也不可以使用充电款

items.question: Can the LiYing projector be controlled by one remote controller for multiple lamps?
items.answer: Yes. A LiYing projector can use one remote controller to control multiple lamps. The receiver must be connected to multiple lamps and the same remote-control code must be paired to those lamps.
items.originalQuestion: 励影可以做到一个遥控器控制多台灯具吗
items.originalAnswer: 可以的，励影可以做到一个遥控器可以控制多台灯具，一个遥控配码多台灯具就好

items.question: Can the water-ripple projector be customized with a rail-track system?
items.answer: No. Rail-track customization is not supported for water-ripple lights.
items.originalQuestion: 水纹灯可以定制轨道吗
items.originalAnswer: 不可以，轨道做不了水纹灯

items.question: How can customers use or view the company self-developed laser animation fixture manual?
items.answer: The original customer record points to a Yuque instruction link. For public customer use, create a cleaned public manual page on the Noparde website or GitHub and link to it from the relevant product page.
items.originalQuestion: 公司自研激光动画灯使用说明
items.originalAnswer: https://shenzhen-alading.yuque.com/org-wiki-shenzhen-alading-grezdo/eogldo/vnznz83fx0oko4v
